name: io.github.qingxuantang/tar-engine
title: TAR Engine
description: Audit AI skill safety before you ship. Static rules + semantic LLM analysis + adversarial prompt fuzz + supply chain scan across SKILL.md, Claude Code custom commands, Codex skill.yaml, and OpenCode configs.

packageArguments.name: --from
packageArguments.description: Install the tar-engine wheel that provides the tar-engine-mcp executable.

packageArguments.name: tar-engine-mcp
packageArguments.description: Run the MCP server entry point exposed by the tar-engine wheel.

environmentVariables.name: TAR_ENGINE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the audit backend. Default is the hosted playground at https://tarai.dev. Set to http://localhost:8765 (or your own tar-engine deployment) to self-host and keep SKILL.md content on your machine.

environmentVariables.name: TAR_ENGINE_BYOK_OPENAI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key that unlocks the semantic LLM and adversarial prompt-fuzz layers. Static and supply-chain layers run without it.

environmentVariables.name: TAR_ENGINE_BYOK_ANTHROPIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key alternative to the OpenAI key for the semantic and adversarial layers.
